/usr/bin/c++ -rdynamic CMakeFiles/Obstacles.dir/ObstaclesPubSubTypes.cxx.o CMakeFiles/Obstacles.dir/ObstaclesPublisher.cxx.o CMakeFiles/Obstacles.dir/ObstaclesSubscriber.cxx.o CMakeFiles/Obstacles.dir/ObstaclesPubSubMain.cxx.o -o Obstacles  libObstacles_lib.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libfastrtps.so.2.5.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libfastcdr.so.1.0.23 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libfoonathan_memory.so.0.7.1 -lpthread -ldl -ltinyxml2 -lpthread -ldl -ltinyxml2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so -lrt
